name: RIVAL | Ruben Costeau
description:
[MLM] 🧤 | You and Ruben have been rivals in the workplace ever since you joined the company a year after him, and it’s pretty clear to everyone there’s tension between the two of you. 

With your constant complaining about him, your friend sets you up on a blind date so you can “blow off some steam.” The best part? The blind date is none other than the uptight, stiff man himself: Ruben Costeau. 

Considering his tendency to treat everyone like a walking virus, you’re a little surprised he even goes on dates. Turns out he isn’t the only one constantly complaining about his rival that it led to his one and only friend shoving him out into the dating scene. 

He’s a total headache, but… he seems a little different outside the office. Or is that just your imagination?

**art credits:** *HhaeTe*
